validator_meta_description: Validates tours against AZG rules and shows errors and co-decision warnings in the calendar.
validator_intro_select_day: Click a day in the calendar to view all details on the right.
mitentscheid_none: No co-decisions have been made yet.
validator_legend_intro: The legend shows which rule groups are tested by the validator and their corresponding rule codes.
validator_select_day_prompt: Select a day in the calendar to view details.
validator_no_issues: No rule violation or warning found.
validator_issue_hidden: This message is hidden in the overview.
validator_decision_window_note: This decision is applied for this specific 4-week window.
validator_rule_night_desc: Checks night work between 00:00 and 04:00 for a 28-day limit and excessive consecutive days.
validator_rule_special_desc: Checks additional rules for tours above 9h up to 10h working time (no consecutive days, max 11h shift duration, no night window).
validator_rule_data_desc: Checks required fields and plausibility such as start/end, duty data on non-working days and time ordering.
validator_rule_rest_desc: Checks minimum rest between duties and minimum duration of a single rest-day block.
validator_rule_duration_desc: Checks working-time limits, shift duration and consistency between working time, shift duration and paid break.
validator_rule_avg_desc: Checks whether the average of the last 7 relevant working days exceeds 9 hours.
arbeitszeit_meta_description: History and future projection of working time accounts based on snapshots and tours.
arbeitszeit_intro: History from account snapshots and future projection based on planned tours.
arbeitszeit_restday_intro: Calculates the full year ({from} to {to}) according to clause 72 CBA: 63 rest days and {ctTarget} compensation days.
arbeitszeit_holiday_note: Vacation allocations are listed separately and already included in totals (RD: {rt}, CD: {ct}).
arbeitszeit_saturday_note: Saturdays in year: {saturdays}. This results in CD target = {ctTarget}.
arbeitszeit_estimate_range: Estimated period with unplanned RD/CD days: {from} to {to}
arbeitszeit_no_estimates: No unplanned RD/CD days found in the annual cycle.
arbeitszeit_no_future_tours: No future tours found for projection.
arbeitszeit_no_events_selected_accounts: No events found for the selected accounts.
arbeitszeit_no_snapshot_history: No snapshot history available yet. Please synchronize on the tours page first.
home_intro_disclaimer: This tool helps you handle tasks efficiently. This website is not affiliated with SBB in any way.
footer_disclaimer: This website is not affiliated with SBB in any way.
touren_meta_description: Overview of all tours assigned to the logged-in user.
touren_subheading: All tours assigned to you in one place.
touren_no_tours_found: No tours found. The calendar still shows you the current month.
auth_login_subtitle: Use your account credentials to continue.
auth_passkeys_not_supported: Passkeys are not supported in this browser.
auth_register_subtitle: Register with Better Auth email and password.
auth_logout_confirm: Are you sure you want to sign out?
profile_subtitle: Manage your account, password, passkeys, and API keys.
profile_error_create_api_key: Could not create an API key.
profile_api_key_created_success: API key created successfully. Please copy it now because it will not be shown again.
profile_store_api_key_securely: Store this securely. You will not be able to retrieve it again.
